CustomField.description: Machine-readable reason the scan was paused. Allows the LWC to display the correct banner message without parsing Scan_Diagnostic_Log__c. NodeCapReached = scan hit Max_Components__c limit. EmptyCycleLimitReached = engine detected repeated cycles with no new nodes found. Set by the engine only when transitioning Status to Paused. Null for non-Paused jobs. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Pause Reason
